title: OneDrive sync stuck with red X

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] OneDrive shows red X and stops syncing
servicenow_seed.description: User sees a red X on the OneDrive icon. Files have not synced for several hours. Other apps work.

correct_steps: Verify caller and confirm only one user is affected
Check OneDrive account is signed in (Settings > Account)
Look for sync conflicts and resolve (rename or accept server copy)
Check available cloud storage and local disk space
Right-click OneDrive > Pause then Resume; if needed, sign out and back in
rationale: OneDrive red X is almost always a single-user sync conflict, storage limit, or stale token. Resolve at Tier 1.
hints: Open the OneDrive activity center to see the exact error.
If multiple users hit the same error, check Service Health.
learning_objectives: Distinguish a single-user client issue from a service outage

tool_clues.endpoint: Local disk: 2.3 GB free. OneDrive folder: 38 GB used / 50 GB quota.
